task_completion.description: EdrawMax is open and a Value Stream Map diagram is being created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax application window is visible with Value Stream Map shapes (such as process boxes, data boxes, or timeline ladders) placed on the canvas.

task_completion.description: The 'Release Planning' process control is connected to the 'Development Team' supplier and 'Production Users' customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A shape labeled 'Release Planning' (typically at the top) is connected to 'Development Team' and 'Production Users' shapes via electronic information flow arrows (often depicted as lightning bolt arrows).

task_completion.description: The five specified process steps are created with their respective CT and CO times.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Five process boxes are visible and labeled: 'Code Review', 'Build & Unit Test', 'Integration Testing', 'Staging Deploy', and 'Production Deploy'. Data boxes below or near them should show the specified CT (Cycle Time) and CO (Changeover Time) values.

task_completion.description: Process steps are connected with push arrows and inventory/queue wait times are indicated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Push arrows (typically striped or thick arrows) connect the process steps in sequence. Wait times of 8, 12, 24, and 4 hours are indicated between the steps, often using inventory triangles or text labels.

task_completion.description: A timeline ladder is present with Total Lead Time and Total Processing Time calculated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A timeline ladder shape is at the bottom of the diagram, with text explicitly showing '56.25' (Total Lead Time) and '8.25' (Total Processing Time).

task_completion.description: The diagram is saved with the correct filename and path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax window title bar, a 'Save As' dialog, or a file manager window shows the filename 'deployment_vsm.eddx' in the '/home/ga/Diagrams/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with EdrawMax menus, toolbars, and the canvas to drag and drop shapes and enter text.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to generate the .eddx file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent writing Python scripts or using command-line tools to bypass the EdrawMax GUI for diagram creation.

integrity.description: The diagram appears to be a genuine EdrawMax creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The diagram elements are actual EdrawMax vector shapes and text objects, not a pasted image from an external source.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is '/home/ga/Diagrams/deployment_vsm.eddx'. The required process step labels include 'Code Review', 'Integration Testing', 'Staging Deploy', and 'Release Planning'. The calculated Total Lead Time must be exactly '56.25' and Total Processing Time must be exactly '8.25'.
